meta.title: Jhon Alejandro Piraquive | Resume & Portfolio
meta.description: Systems Engineer, Cybersecurity Specialist and Fullstack Developer based in Medellín, Colombia.

about.title: About me
about.summary: Systems and Telecom Engineer with a Cybersecurity Specialization and over {expYears} years of professional experience building scalable platforms, cloud infrastructure and secure software.
about.role: Senior Developer & Cybersecurity Specialist & University Professor
about.motto: My rule is simple: deliver a little more than anyone expects.
about.bio: At Heinsohn I grew from Junior to Senior: I started on CareTree only, Dala was added as Semi-Senior, and today as Senior I work across CareTree, Dala and Islamic Relief Canada (IRC). My stack spans Go microservices, Laravel/PHP backends, React and React Native frontends, GraphQL APIs and AWS cloud infrastructure.

experienceIntro: Over {expYears} years of progressive experience — from systems technician to senior developer and university professor, building enterprise software, securing digital infrastructure and training future engineers.

experience.title: University Professor
experience.intro: I design and deliver academic content for engineering students in virtual and in-person modalities, constantly translating industry practices into structured, applicable learning:
bullets: I teach architecture, configuration and production deployment of web services.
I deliver web-oriented programming with PHP, HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
I guide students in Linux and Windows operating system administration and configuration.
I facilitate relational database, SQL and productivity tools courses.
I teach web performance, optimization techniques and SEO best practices.
I deliver object-oriented software design principles and UML analysis.
I introduce fundamental programming concepts for web environments.

roles.summary: End-to-end leadership across three fronts: tickets, technology, infrastructure, documentation and production delivery.
responsibilities: I create and prioritize tickets, define acceptance criteria and guide the team through delivery.
I decide on technologies, architecture and infrastructure (cloud, pipelines, containers) and document with diagrams and specs.
CareTree: I co-lead PHP/Laravel backends, React Native apps, AWS, health-data security and Docker containers.
Dala: I lead the health management platform — Go microservices, GraphQL, AWS, Algolia, PostHog and React interfaces.
IRC (Islamic Relief Canada): I build web apps (React), mobile apps (React Native) and backends — internal tools and mass-donation platforms for high-impact events.

roles.summary: Beyond coding, I joined requirements gathering and added Dala to my project portfolio.
responsibilities: I joined requirements gathering with stakeholders and translated business needs into technical tasks.
CareTree: I delivered more complex features, Laravel backends and continuous improvements with greater autonomy.
Dala: I joined building the health platform from scratch — APIs, React frontends and early cloud architecture.
I contributed to code reviews and shared technical decisions across both projects.

roles.summary: Development-only focus on CareTree: execute well-defined activities with quality.
responsibilities: I implemented CareTree tickets and technical tasks with scope and criteria already defined by the team.
I built features on the CareTree stack (PHP/Laravel, web and mobile as assigned).
I focused on code, tests and delivery — without leading discovery, architecture or infrastructure.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.intro: I delivered full-cycle custom software projects for a consulting and security firm, acting as developer and client liaison — from requirements gathering through deployment, training and post-delivery support. I applied Kanban and Scrum to maintain delivery velocity and client alignment.
bullets: I designed and built a suite of custom web systems with PHP/Laravel and MySQL.
I developed CRM, personnel management, logistics, weapons control and security consulting modules.
I built financial and commercial management tools, including credits, strategic finance and KPI dashboards.
I implemented intranet and user management systems with role-based access control.
I conducted client training and provided ongoing technical support after delivery.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.intro: I built custom web solutions for a cloud-oriented software consultancy, delivering SQL-backed systems tailored to each client's operational workflows.
bullets: I developed CRM systems and user management and intranet platforms with PHP/Laravel and MySQL.
I built electronic quoting tools, parameterization modules and system configuration.
I implemented credit management modules, commercial reports and strategic finance.

experience.title: Junior Developer
experience.intro: I remotely designed and developed an intranet platform with integrated CRM for a temporary staffing company, enabling administrators to manage contracts, client accounts and system settings through a centralized web interface.

experience.title: Systems Technician
experience.intro: I advised clients on computer equipment purchases, performed preventive and corrective hardware maintenance, and diagnosed and resolved network infrastructure issues — laying practical foundations for a career in software and security.

educationIntro: A continuous academic journey spanning engineering, cybersecurity, data analytics and language studies.

posts.intro: Technical writing contributions and knowledge sharing for the cybersecurity and software engineering community, including published articles and academic research.

items.author: Author — The Hacking Day
items.description: Publication of the article "Pentesting on Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud Platform servers" (April 2024). The article covers advanced offensive techniques applied to cloud environments, demonstrating practical knowledge of attack surfaces on AWS and GCP, reconnaissance methods and mitigation strategies. Shared with a global audience of cybersecurity professionals.

hobbies.title: Interests
hobbies.text: I'm a technology geek at heart — always reading about new stacks, trying emerging tools, experimenting with AI and finding ways to bring the latest innovations into real projects. I love motorcycles deeply, and although I currently drive a car (a big and meaningful step toward what I'm building), the passion for riding never fades. My greatest motivation right now is my family. Financial independence isn't just a career goal — it's a commitment. Being able to provide for and give back to the people who matter most in my life is what drives me to keep learning, keep building and keep giving more. That same motivation is behind my goal of founding my own technology company. I firmly believe the only way to truly succeed is by giving a little more than anyone expects — and that reflects who I am in every sense. When I'm not coding or teaching, you'll find me at the gym, on the field playing American football, traveling somewhere new or sharing meaningful moments with my partner and family — the people who make it all worthwhile.
